name: Peanut Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 inch ginger root, peeled and minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ginger root, chiles, garlic, and green onions in a mixing bowl.
2. Whisk in the peanut butter, coconut milk, lime juice, fish sauce, and sugar.
3. Taste and adjust seasoning if necessary. Sprinkle with cilantro.
